title: Native Numbered Hotbar
description: Little keyboard numbers over hotbar slots, in containers hotbar like chest, anvil or horse, and F symbol for offhand slot
body:
Original hotbar textures with numbers over slots.

![Preview](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1d650ccfe1dd2659331ae8eb25b40ecff84a153c.png)

Numbers added to **every place you see hotbar**, and `F` letter is added for offhand slot.

- Hotbar `textures/gui/sprites/hud/hotbar`
- Hotbar Offhand Left `textures/gui/sprites/hud/hotbar_offhand_left`
- Hotbar Offhand Right `textures/gui/sprites/hud/hotbar_offhand_right`
- Hotbar Selection `textures/gui/sprites/hud/hotbar_selection`

Creative Inventory

- Inventory Tab `textures/gui/container/creative_inventory/tab_inventory`
- Item Search Tab `textures/gui/container/creative_inventory/tab_item_search`
- Items Tab `textures/gui/container/creative_inventory/tab_items`

Containers

- Anvil `textures/gui/container/anvil`
- Beacon `textures/gui/container/beacon`
- Furnace `textures/gui/container/furnace`
- Brewing Stand `textures/gui/container/brewing_stand`
- Cartography Table `textures/gui/container/cartography_table`
- Crafter `textures/gui/container/crafter`
- Crafting Table `textures/gui/container/crafting_table`
- Dispenser `textures/gui/container/dispenser`
- Enchanting Table `textures/gui/container/enchanting_table`
- Blast Furnace `textures/gui/container/blast_furnace`
- Double Chest `textures/gui/container/generic_54`
- Grindstone `textures/gui/container/grindstone`
- Hopper `textures/gui/container/hopper`
- Horse `textures/gui/container/horse`
- Inventory `textures/gui/container/inventory`
- Loom `textures/gui/container/loom`
- Nautilus `textures/gui/container/nautilus`
- Shulker Box `textures/gui/container/shulker_box`
- Smithing `textures/gui/container/smithing`
- Stonecutter `textures/gui/container/stonecutter`
- Villager `textures/gui/container/villager`
